title: 12 Pairs White Thin PU Palm Coated Work Safety Gloves, Knitted Liner, Multi-Function, Light-Weight, Sensibility, Breathable, Grip, General Purpose Job Handling (9/L, white)
features: 13 gauge white polyester knitted seamless liner with palm and fingertips white PU coated work gloves.

Applications: - Assembling - Logistic and warehouse work - DIY - Gardening - other light weight jobs
